Subject: Request for One-Week Extension on Contract Review Deadline

Dear Counsel,

I hope this message finds you well. I'm writing to respectfully request a one-week extension of our current deadline for the contract review. A few scheduling matters on my end have arisen that would benefit from a bit more time, and I believe an additional seven days will allow us to return more thorough and considered comments.

Please let me know at your earliest convenience whether this extension is workable on your side, and I apologize for any inconvenience this may cause. I'm happy to discuss by phone or email if that would be helpful, and I appreciate your flexibility and continued collaboration.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
